name: Trigger Happy Havoc
description:
These are all the Trigger Happy Havoc characters. It includes Monokuma as well!

Trigger Happy Havoc is the first installment of the series called Danganronpa. Each character is Aoi Asahina, Makoto Naegi, Byakuya Togami, Celestia Ludenburg, Junko Enoshima, Leon Kuwata, Kyoko Kirigiri, Kiyotaka Ishimaru, Chihiro Fujisaki, Mondo Owada, Sakura Maizono, Mukuro Ikusaba, Toko Fukawa, and Yasuhiro Hagukure.
creator: _Galaxtic_
